Trusted Jacksonville Power Washing Experts

Jacksonville's Trusted Power Washing Experts

Restoring surfaces with precision since 2012. Serving Duval County homes with tailored solutions for our coastal climate.

Family Owned & Operated Industry Certified 16+ Years of Experience 5.0 Rating
5.0 5.0 A+
Verified Reviews

Get a Free Estimate

What Your Neighbors Have to Say

Read More Reviews →
M
Marshall T.

After three Jacksonville summers, our white metal roof was streaked with black algae. Apex not only restored it to like-new condition but spotted (and fixed) a loose panel that could've become a leak. Their drone photos showed exactly where the worst buildup was.

L
Lisa R.

Our Riverside deck hadn't been cleaned in years—gray with mildew between the boards. The team hand-scrubbed the intricate railings and used just enough pressure to clean without gouging the old heart pine. The oil treatment they applied has held up through two rainy seasons.

C
Carlos M.

The brick pavers around our San Marco pool were turning green from constant shade. Apex's rotary cleaning got into every joint without disturbing the sand base, and their sealant recommendation has kept the area looking fresh despite weekly pool parties.

D
Danielle K.

Living two blocks from Jacksonville Beach means constant salt spray on our siding. Apex's team knew exactly which areas needed gentler treatment and which could handle stronger pressure. They even cleaned our outdoor light fixtures without a single bulb replacement needed.

Additional Power Washing Services

Apex Power Washing — Certified Professionals

Our team brings certified expertise and years of experience to every power washing project. We stand behind our work with comprehensive warranties and a commitment to quality.

More About Us →

The Apex Power Washing Way

Our proven process ensures every project is completed with precision, transparency, and care.

1

Consultation

We start with a thorough, no-obligation assessment. Our certified team evaluates your needs and provides a detailed report with recommendations.

2

Plan & Prepare

We work with you to determine the best approach for your specific power washing needs. Our experts ensure the right plan for quality results.

3

Get It Done

Our skilled team gets to work with precision and efficiency. We maintain a clean, organized environment and keep you informed every step of the way.

4

Quality Check

Before we consider any job complete, our team performs a comprehensive quality review. We verify every detail meets our exacting standards.

5

Wrap Up

Transparent pricing with no surprises. You only pay when you're 100% satisfied with the work. We offer flexible options to make the process seamless.

Proudly Serving Jacksonville & Beyond

As a locally owned and operated company, we're proud to serve customers throughout Jacksonville, FL and the surrounding communities. Our team brings local expertise and dedication to every project.

St. Augustine Orange Park Jacksonville Beach Fernandina Beach Fleming Island Ponte Vedra Beach Middleburg Green Cove Springs
Let's Get Started →

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our power washing services.

Will power washing damage my historic home's wood siding?

We use low-pressure (500-800 PSI) techniques for fragile materials, combined with gentle cleaning solutions. Our team has restored 60+ historic properties in Riverside without incident.

How often should Jacksonville homes be power washed?

Annual cleaning suffices for most areas, but beachfront properties benefit from biannual service due to accelerated salt buildup.

Built on Jacksonville Values

Call 555-POW-R92 today for free estimates in Jacksonville, St. Augustine, or Orange Park.
